hero.title: World Cup 2026
hero.subtitle: Redeem winning tickets, apply for visas, and book hotels — all in one seamless platform. Experience the biggest sporting event with Vividstream Pro.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: From ticket redemption to travel arrangements, we've got you covered with our comprehensive suite of services.

ticketRedemption.title: Ticket Redemption

worldCupBetting.title: World Cup Betting
worldCupBetting.description: Predict match outcomes and win Vividstream rewards.

trust.secureEncryptedDesc: Your data is protected with enterprise-grade security and SSL encryption.
trust.multiplePaymentDesc: Pay with crypto (BTC, ETH, USDT) or traditional card payments.
trust.globalCoverageDesc: Serving customers in over 120 countries with localized support.

worldCupCTA.title: World Cup 2026 Predictions
worldCupCTA.subtitle: The biggest FIFA World Cup ever with 48 teams! Predict match outcomes, earn Vividstream rewards, and redeem them for exclusive prizes. Join thousands of fans competing for glory.

worldCupShowcase.topContendersDesc: The world's best teams competing for the ultimate prize

about.title: About Vividstream Pro
about.subtitle: We are the premier platform for FIFA World Cup 2026 ticket management, visa applications, and travel accommodations.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide football fans worldwide with seamless access to FIFA World Cup 2026 experiences through innovative technology, secure transactions, and exceptional customer service.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the global leader in sports event management platforms, connecting fans with their dream World Cup experiences while setting new standards for reliability and convenience in the industry.

ticketManagement.title: Ticket Management
ticketManagement.description: Secure ticket purchase, redemption, and management through our streamlined digital platform. Verified tickets guaranteed.

visaApplication.title: Visa Application
visaApplication.description: Simplified visa application process with expert guidance. We help navigate the documentation requirements for a hassle-free experience.

hotelBooking.title: Hotel Booking
hotelBooking.description: Access to exclusive hotel deals near stadiums and fan zones. From luxury suites to budget-friendly options.

securePayments.title: Secure Payments
securePayments.description: Multiple payment options including credit cards and cryptocurrency. Your transactions are protected with bank-level security.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Round-the-clock customer support in multiple languages. Our team is here to assist you at every step of your journey.

verified.title: Verified Experience
verified.description: Every ticket and booking is verified through official channels. Guaranteed authentic experiences for all customers.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Vividstream Pro?
items: Competitive pricing with price match guarantee

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

cta.title: Ready for World Cup 2026?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of fans who have already secured their spots for the biggest sporting event in the world.

redeem.title: Redeem Your Ticket

redeem.instructions: Enter your winning ticket code below to claim your prize.
redeem.emailHint: Enter the email address where you received your ticket code
steps: Check your email for the ticket notification
Look for the unique code (starts with "VS-" or "WIN-")
Enter it above and click redeem
